originalPrompt: create hello world app with color picker

subtasks.title: Project initialization
subtasks.description: Initialize a new project repository, set up build tools, and create a basic file structure for the app.
subtasks.successCriteria: Repository created with README, package files (or equivalent), and starter files; project builds without errors.

subtasks.title: Create Hello World UI
subtasks.description: Implement the main UI containing a visible "Hello World" text element and a layout placeholder for controls.
subtasks.successCriteria: "Hello World" text renders correctly in the app and layout reserves space for controls.

subtasks.title: Add color picker control
subtasks.description: Add a color picker component or input to the UI enabling users to choose colors (native or library-based).
subtasks.successCriteria: Color picker appears in the UI, opens/operates, and provides a selected color value programmatically.

subtasks.title: Bind color selection to text
subtasks.description: Connect the color picker's selected value to the Hello World text color so the text updates live when a color is chosen.
subtasks.successCriteria: Selecting a color immediately updates the Hello World text color across supported platforms/browsers.

subtasks.title: Persist selected color
subtasks.description: Implement simple persistence (local storage, user defaults, or file) so the chosen color is retained between app sessions.
subtasks.successCriteria: After restarting the app, the previously selected color is restored and applied to the Hello World text.

subtasks.title: Test and deliver
subtasks.description: Run functional tests, fix issues, document usage, and produce a build or deployment artifact for release.
subtasks.successCriteria: All core flows (display, color selection, persistence) pass manual or automated tests and a build is produced for distribution.

decompositionStrategy: Top-down incremental: create a minimal working UI first, then add the color picker, bind functionality, persist state, and finish with testing/deployment.
